description: Style NoteWe like this quick and easy way to accessorise your outfit and style your look! wac by wrangler has created a winner with these caps. They can be worn on any outdoor trip, whether you're out and about in town or heading into the wild for a trekking trip. Product DetailsBlack, grey, white and red cap, has a circular crown, eyelets around, stitched detail on the visor, elasticated at the back for easy Fit and brand patch appliqué on the sideMaterial and Care100% cottonDry clean only
